  • Uses of Simulation in microsim.simulation.component

    Fields in microsim.simulation.component declared as Simulation
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    Simulation
    SimulationComponent.simulation
    Simulation this component belongs to.
    Constructors in microsim.simulation.component with parameters of type Simulation
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    BusComponent(Bus bus, Simulation simulation)
    Instantiates bus component, taking a reference to the bus it's mounted to and the simulation it belongs to.
     
    SimulationComponent(Simulation simulation)
    Instantiates component, taking a reference to the simulation it belongs to.

  • Uses of Simulation in microsim.simulation.component.bus

    Constructors in microsim.simulation.component.bus with parameters of type Simulation
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Bus(Simulation simulation)
    Instantiates a bus by initializing address, data and control lines.
     
    TSLine(Bus bus, Simulation simulation)
    Constructs a TSLine taking a reference to the bus it makes up.

  • Uses of Simulation in microsim.simulation.component.device

    Constructors in microsim.simulation.component.device with parameters of type Simulation
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    IoDevice(Bus bus, Simulation simulation, int base, int ports)
    Instantiates device, taking a reference to the bus it's mounted on, the base address it should respond from and the number of ports it offers.
     
    ThreadedIoDevice(Bus bus, Simulation simulation, int base, int ports)
    Instantiates device, taking a reference to the bus it's mounted on, the base address it should respond from and the number of ports it offers.

    DebugShell.simulationInstances

    Methods in microsim.ui with parameters of type Simulation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    DebugShell.attachSimulation(Simulation simulationInstance)
    Attaches a new simulation instance to the debug shell (basically makes self a listener and takes a reference to show on demand information from shell).
